subject: Sri Sri Guru Gauranga Gandharva Rasa Bihari Jiu

translations.short_description: Temple or Deity festival connected with Sri Sri Guru Gauranga Gandharva Rasa Bihari Jiu. This event is matched by the tithi rule stored in the calendar database.
